name: Disguise Self
description: You make yourself—including your clothing, armor, weapons, and other belongings on your person—look different until the spell ends or until you use your action to dismiss it.
effect: You alter your height, weight, facial features, voice, hair, and clothing to appear as a different humanoid of the same size. Lasts 1 hour; a creature that physically interacts with or succeeds on an Investigation check can see through the illusion.
notes: Does not change your scent, weight, or sounds — physical contact or Investigation check reveals the illusion.
Dismissed with an action before the 1-hour duration expires.
